description: Web-based tool for creating standardized CITATION.cff files that enable proper citation of research software, improving software findability and supporting FAIR principles through structured metadata generation.
name: cffinit

indicators.Fairness: measures Fairness by enabling standardized software citation through CITATION.cff files, ensuring proper attribution of authors and contributors, improving metadata completeness, and enhancing equitable visibility and reuse of research software.

useCases: Generate CITATION.cff files to ensure proper citation of research software in publications
Improve discoverability and reuse of software through standardized citation metadata
Provide clear attribution to authors and contributors in collaborative research projects
Prepare software repositories for FAIR compliance and integration with platforms like GitHub and Zenodo
